header: Your editors will love the backend again
description: The Visual Editor puts editing on the rendered page itself — click a headline, type, done — while every one of the 255 elements ships a live preview in the page module. No more guessing which gray record is the hero: what editors see is exactly what ships.

image.title: Editing in the Desiderio Visual Editor
image.alternative: TYPO3 Visual Editor showing a Desiderio page being edited inline with live preview.
image.description: Screenshot of inline editing in the Visual Editor with Desiderio installed.
